results.title: UnitedHealth Q2 2026 earnings beat, raises full-year profit forecast
results.description: UnitedHealth Group reported second-quarter results on Thursday that topped analyst expectations and raised its full-year profit outlook, as improved medical cost management and stronger performance at its Optum health services unit drove earnings higher. UnitedHealth's adjusted earnings reached...

results.title: Neko Health raises $700m as US market entry draws closer
results.description: Neko Health has raised $700m, setting the company up with proceeds to scale its full-body scanning service ahead of the planned launch of its first US clinics this year. Putting its funds raised to date at over $1bn, Neko's Series C financing round was led by Lightspeed Venture Partners and co-led...
